class.name: nav2_costmap_2d/TerrainGlobalLayer
class.description: Layer that continuously merges terrain/sterling costmap into the global costmap

class.name: custom_costmap_layers/RingSlopeSTVLLayer
class.description: Drop-in replacement for SpatioTemporalVoxelLayer that applies a ring-based slope filter to each organized PointCloud2 before STVL marks voxels. Adjacent elevation ring points in each azimuth column are sorted by z and compared pairwise; a point is suppressed only when both its upper and lower elevation neighbours independently agree the transition resembles sloped ground (dz/dxy <= slope_threshold). Configure identically to STVL plus two additional params: slope_threshold and min_dz.
